param.name: place
param.value: ('[', string-join((ec:translate(@type, false(), false()),ec:translate(@place, false(), false()),ec:translate(@hand, false(), false())), ' '), if (@scribe) then (' ', ec:label('byScribe', false()), ' ', ec:scribe(@scribe)) else (), ec:punct(':', false()), ']')

param.name: content
param.value: ('[', string-join((ec:translate(@type, false(), false()),ec:translate(@place, false(), false()),ec:translate(@hand, false(), false())), ' '), if (@scribe) then (' ', ec:label('byScribe', false()), ' ', ec:scribe(@scribe)) else (), ec:punct(':', false()), '] ', .)
